name: The Citizens State Bank
description_short: Community bank based in Marysville, Kansas, offering personal and business banking services, agriculture loans, mortgages, and credit products across three branch locations.
description_long:
The Citizens State Bank of Marysville is a regional community bank headquartered in Marysville, Kansas, with a strong presence in rural Kansas communities. The bank operates three physical branch locations: the main office in Marysville, a drive-up facility also in Marysville, and branches in Hanover and Waterville. The institution emphasizes local relationship banking and positions itself as a partner invested in customer financial success.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including personal checking and savings accounts (including a "Totally FREE Checking" product), business banking accounts, home mortgages for purchase/refinance/construction, and debit/credit card services. A significant portion of their business focuses on agricultural lending, with specialized loan products for equipment, land, operating costs, and livestock. They provide online and mobile banking capabilities, e-statements, and various convenience services like check ordering and card alerts. The bank also offers Visa credit cards and Shazam Brella debit card protection services.

What distinguishes Citizens State Bank is their explicit focus on agriculture lending and rural community banking. The website emphasizes that their employees have agricultural backgrounds and understand the seasonal and operational demands of farm businesses. They market themselves as a local alternative to larger regional or national banks, with personalized service and decision-making at the branch level. The bank also runs a customer referral program offering incentives for bringing new customers.

As a community bank, Citizens State Bank provides traditional banking services with local decision-making and relationship-based lending. However, customers should note that the bank operates limited hours (closed Saturdays except for one drive-up location) and has a geographic footprint limited to rural Kansas. Their online/mobile capabilities are mentioned but details are limited on the website. Like most community banks, they may offer less competitive rates or fewer premium products compared to larger institutions, though this is typical for relationship-focused regional banks.
services: Debit cards with Shazam Brella protection
pros: Specialized agricultural lending with staff who understand farm operations and seasonal cash flow
Three convenient branch locations across rural Kansas (Marysville, Hanover, Waterville)
Free checking account product with referral rewards program
24/7 debit card loss/theft reporting via Shazam Mastercard
Online and mobile banking access with e-statements and debit card alerts
Mortgage services covering construction, purchase, and refinancing
Local decision-making and community relationship banking model
cons: Limited branch hours with most locations closed Saturdays; only one drive-up location open Saturdays
Geographic footprint limited to rural Kansas; not suitable for customers outside service area
Website provides minimal detail about rates, fees, CD terms, or product specifics
No information about checking account minimum balances, overdraft fees, or other fee structures
Limited detail on online/mobile banking capabilities and security features
best_for: Agricultural business owners and farmers seeking specialized ag lending products
Rural Kansas residents seeking community-focused banking relationships
Small to medium-sized businesses in the Marysville, Hanover, or Waterville areas
Homebuyers in rural Kansas seeking local mortgage origination and servicing
diagnosis: Best for agricultural businesses and rural Kansas residents seeking personalized community banking with specialized farm lending expertise. Main caveat: very limited geographic footprint (three rural Kansas counties only) and limited operating hours make this unsuitable for customers outside their service area or those requiring extended banking access.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
